mapper.select: SELECT d.user_no as userNo, d.user_name as userName, d.address as address, d.building_info as buildingInfo, d.contact_phone as contactPhone, p.date as date, p.id as id, p.description as description FROM gas_worker_plan p JOIN gas_user d ON p.user_id = d.id WHERE p.worker_id = #{workerId} AND p.date = #{date}
